changeSet.author: oe-dev

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_reports_adhoc'

changeSet.comment: Adds Ad-Hoc Report menu item under Reports menu
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.menu (id, parent_id, presentation_order, element_id, action_url, display_key, tool_tip_key, new_window, is_active, hide_in_old_ui) SELECT nextval('menu_seq'), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_reports'), 99, 'menu_reports_adhoc', '/AdHocReport', 'banner.menu.adhoc.report', 'banner.menu.adhoc.report.tooltip', false, true, true;
